description: Projects a campaign progress index (the run-store's won-set + per-level bests, loaded into world.state by `persistence`) into the FLAT per-level keys a data-authored level-select menu binds: `<id>:sel` (a boolean the gated tap-emit reads, so only CLEARED levels are pickable), `<id>:status` (cleared/locked label), `<id>:score` and `<id>:time` (best score / best time, shown for cleared levels). The scene-side companion to createRunStore + the SDK `@level:<id>` flow token; pure (no rng/clock), so determinism is untouched.

levels.description: Ordered level (scene) ids to project — typically the game's manifest.levels.

wonKey.description: world.state key of the won-set map (default 'runWon' — the run-store default).

bestKey.description: world.state key of the per-level bests map (default 'runBest').

prefix.description: Namespacing prefix for the written keys (default '' ⇒ '<id>:sel' etc.).

clearedText.description: Status label for a cleared level (default 'CLEARED').

lockedText.description: Status label for a not-yet-cleared level (default 'LOCKED').

timeTemplate.description: {v}-template for the best time in seconds, 1 dp (default '{v}s').
